meta.description: Federated peer registry (civic/0.5). Each key is a bundle namespace; a relation target written as the CURIE 'namespace:slug' resolves through here. Resolution is offline by default: tooling validates that a foreign edge's namespace is registered (a warning if not), and may optionally fetch a peer's published feed to confirm a target and pull its title. Namespaces are producer-declared; this registry — shipped with the bundle — is the interoperable contract, so a consumer needs no central authority to resolve a cross-bundle edge.
